channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4634] Test failure on test suite sanity-quota, subtest test_22
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for wangdi <di.wang@intel.com>

DISKFS-fs (dm-1): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts:
LustreError: 11-0: lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0001: Communicating with 10.10.17.15@tcp, operation mds_connect failed with -11.
LustreError: 13a-8: Failed to get MGS log params and no local copy.
LustreError: Skipped 1 previous similar message
LustreError: 26638:0:(genops.c:345:class_newdev()) Device lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0001 already exists at 17, won't add
LustreError: 26638:0:(obd_config.c:375:class_attach()) Cannot create device lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0001 of type lwp : -17
LustreError: 26638:0:(obd_mount.c:193:lustre_start_simple()) lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0001 attach error -17
LustreError: 26638:0:(obd_mount_server.c:623:lustre_lwp_setup()) lustre-MDT0000-lwp-MDT0001: setup up failed: rc -17
LustreError: 15c-8: MGC10.10.17.15@tcp: The configuration from log 'lustre-client' failed (-17). This may be the result of communication errors between this node and the MGS, a bad configuration, or other errors. See the syslog for more information.
LustreError: 26582:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1321:server_start_targets()) lustre-MDT0001: failed to start LWP: -17
LustreError: 26582:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1776:server_fill_super()) Unable to start targets: -17
Lustre: Failing over lustre-MDT0001
Lustre: server umount lustre-MDT0001 complete
LustreError: 26582:0:(obd_mount.c:1326:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount (-17)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/mds3
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: test -b /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P3
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/mds3; mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P3 /mnt/mds3
LDISKFS-fs (dm-2): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts:
LustreError: 26783:0:(genops.c:345:class_newdev()) Device MGC10.10.17.15@tcp already exists at 1, won't add
LustreError: 26783:0:(obd_config.c:375:class_attach()) Cannot create device MGC10.10.17.15@tcp of type mgc : -17
LustreError: 26783:0:(obd_mount.c:193:lustre_start_simple()) MGC10.10.17.15@tcp attach error -17
LustreError: 26783:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1503:server_put_super()) no obd lustre-MDT0002
LustreError: 26783:0:(obd_mount_server.c:134:server_deregister_mount()) lustre-MDT0002 not registered
LustreError: 26783:0:(obd_mount.c:1326:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount (-17)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/mds4
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: test -b /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P4
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/mds4; mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl /dev/lvm-Role_MDS/P4 /mnt/mds4
LDISKFS-fs (dm-3): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. quota=on. Opts:
LustreError: 26938:0:(genops.c:345:class_newdev()) Device MGC10.10.17.15@tcp already exists at 1, won't add
LustreError: 26938:0:(obd_config.c:375:class_attach()) Cannot create device MGC10.10.17.15@tcp of type mgc : -17
LustreError: 26938:0:(obd_mount.c:193:lustre_start_simple()) MGC10.10.17.15@tcp attach error -17
LustreError: 26938:0:(obd_mount_server.c:1503:server_put_super()) no obd lustre-MDT0003
LustreError: 26938:0:(obd_mount_server.c:134:server_deregister_mount()) lustre-MDT0003 not registered
LustreError: 26938:0:(obd_mount.c:1326:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount (-17)
SysRq : Show State

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f3fdba0a-95ba-11e3-bb07-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_22 failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Info required for matching: sanity-quota 22
item.summary: Test failure on test suite sanity-quota, subtest test_22

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
